mapper.insert: insert into app_market_user ( market_id, user_type, creator_id, create_time, updater_id, update_time, deleted, tenant_id) values ( #{entity.marketId}, 'owner', #{entity.creatorId}, now(), #{entity.updaterId}, now(), 0, #{entity.tenantId})

insert into app_market_user ( market_id, user_type, creator_id, create_time, updater_id, update_time, deleted) values (#{entity.marketId}, #{entity.userType}, #{entity.creatorId}, now(), #{entity.updaterId}, now(), 0)

insert into app_market_user (
market_id, user_type, creator_id, create_time, updater_id, update_time, deleted ) values
(
#{entity.marketId}, #{entity.userType}, #{entity.creatorId}, now(), #{entity.updaterId}, now(), #{entity.deleted} )
mapper.select:
select amu.id id, amu.user_type userType, amu.creator_id creatorId, amu.create_time createTime, tu.login_name userName, tu.name realName, tu.email email, tu.phone phone from app_market_user amu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_user tu on tu.id = amu.creator_id and tu.is_delete = 0 where amu.market_id = #{entity.marketId} and amu.deleted = 0
and upper(tu.login_name) like concat('%', upper(#{entity.userName}), '%')
and upper(tu.name) like concat('%', upper(#{entity.realName}), '%')
order by ${entity.sortBy} desc
order by ${entity.sortBy} asc
order by createTime desc
select creator_id from app_market_user where market_id = #{marketId} and user_type = 'owner' and deleted = 0 limit 1
select user_type from app_market_user where market_id = #{marketId} and creator_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 limit 1

select phone, name realName, id creatorId from ${databaseName}.t_uap_user tu where exists(select id from app_market_user amu where amu.creator_id = tu.id and amu.deleted = 0 and amu.market_id = #{entity.marketId} and amu.tenant_id = #{entity.tenantId}) and not exists(select id from robot_execute re where re.deleted = 0 and re.creator_id = tu.id and re.data_source = 'market' and re.market_id = #{entity.marketId} and re.app_id = #{entity.appId})
and phone like CONCAT('%',#{entity.phone},'%')
and is_delete = 0 limit 20

select tu.phone, tu.name realName, tu.id creatorId from ${databaseName}.t_uap_user tu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_tenant_user tutu on tu.id = tutu.user_id and tutu.tenant_id = #{entity.tenantId} where not exists(select id from app_market_user amu where amu.creator_id = tu.id and amu.deleted = 0 and amu.market_id = #{entity.marketId} ) and phone like CONCAT('%',#{entity.phone},'%') and is_delete = 0 limit 20

select uu.phone phone, uu.name realName, utu.user_id creatorId from ${databaseName}.t_uap_user uu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_tenant_user utu on uu.id = utu.user_id INNER JOIN app_market_user amu ON utu.user_id = amu.creator_id where uu.phone like CONCAT('%',#{entity.phone},'%') and utu.tenant_id = #{entity.tenantId} and uu.is_delete = 0 AND amu.deleted = 0 AND amu.market_id = #{marketId} AND utu.user_id != #{userId}

select utu.tenant_id tenantId, uu.id userId from ${databaseName}.t_uap_user uu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_tenant_user utu on uu.id = utu.user_id where uu.is_delete = 0 and utu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and uu.id in
#{entity.creatorId}
mapper.update: update app_market_user set user_type = 'owner' where market_id = #{marketId} and creator_id = #{newOwnerId} and deleted = 0
update app_market_user set deleted = 1 where market_id = #{marketId} and deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select creator_id from app_market_user where deleted = 0 and market_id = #{marketId} and creator_id in
#{userId}

select amu.id id, amu.user_type userType, amu.creator_id creatorId, amu.create_time createTime, tu.login_name userName, tu.name realName, tu.email email, tu.phone phone from app_market_user amu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_user tu on tu.id = amu.creator_id and tu.is_delete = 0 where amu.market_id = #{entity.marketId} and amu.deleted = 0 and amu.user_type != 'owner'
and amu.creator_id != #{nowUserid}
and upper(tu.login_name) like concat('%', upper(#{entity.userName}), '%')
and upper(tu.name) like concat('%', upper(#{entity.realName}), '%')
order by ${entity.sortBy} desc
order by ${entity.sortBy} asc
order by createTime desc

select utu.tenant_id tenantId, uu.id userId from ${databaseName}.t_uap_user uu inner join ${databaseName}.t_uap_tenant_user utu on uu.id = utu.user_id where uu.is_delete = 0 and utu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and uu.id in
#{userId}

select count(1) from app_market_user as amu inner join app_market as am on am.market_id = amu.market_id where amu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and amu.creator_id = #{userId} and amu.deleted = 0 and am.deleted = 0
